# getRef()

**Instance Method**

Returns an IOBluetoothRFCOMMChannelRef representation of the target IOBluetoothRFCOMMChannel object.

## Declaration

```swift
func getRef() -> Unmanaged<IOBluetoothRFCOMMChannelRef>!
```

## Return Value

Returns an IOBluetoothRFCOMMChannelRef representation of the target IOBluetoothRFCOMMChannel object.
